task_summary: Polish the mew-wisp cat terminal form copy so normal human --form cat output starts with resident-facing header/state copy instead of raw implementation diagnostics, while preserving the deterministic cat mask, centered layout, state marker semantics, default form behavior, details gating, watch output, and non-human/live/launcher behavior.
notes: The cat terminal form now emits centered resident-facing copy, including 'mew-wisp resident cat' and 'resident state: ...', and removes normal-output diagnostic labels 'terminal form: cat' and 'cat state:'. The sprite mask rows remain sourced from CAT_TERMINAL_SPRITE_MASK, the state marker line still reflects CAT_TERMINAL_STATE_MARKERS, and _terminal_cat_lines continues to center the full cat form using the configured terminal width. Focused tests cover default/cat ordering, absence of old labels in normal cat output, centered/narrow cat layout and mask similarity, state marker semantics across presence states, --details diagnostics staying behind --details, and watch-count repeated header/panel output. Verification passed with 40 tests. No ANSI color/theme flags, path rename, or mew adapter work were added. Operator corrected only the report side_project from the historical path name mew-ghost to the canonical product name mew-wisp before ledger append.
